summary: Excellent audio captures a smoking performance, hailed as one of the best‑heard shows.
review: The reviewer rates this recording four stars and calls it "the best I have heard," praising both the sound quality and the overall vibe of the concert. While no specific songs or set details are mentioned, the show is described as "smoking" and definitely worth listening to.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single enthusiastic review (4 ★) that praises both performance and audio; insufficient data for higher confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer claims the audio is the best they have heard, indicating very clear and well‑balanced sound despite no explicit source details.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer only notes overall high energy (“smoking”).
